summary.headline: Bunge Limited Finance Corp. increased its unsecured corporate commercial paper program by $1 billion.
summary.narrative_summary: Bunge Global SA announced that Bunge Limited Finance Corp., a wholly-owned subsidiary, expanded its existing unsecured corporate commercial paper program from $2 billion to $3 billion.

ma_or_capital_allocation.description: Bunge Limited Finance Corp. increased its unsecured corporate commercial paper program by $1 billion.
